claim: Phase 002 is the mandatory first ship: P0 safety blocker for the entire 008 feedback-reducer family; no blockers; LOC ~110-180 total
Phases 003 and 004 should ship as a merge-sprint (same branch, separate specs) to avoid two schema-migration deployment windows; 004 is explicit prereq of 005
Phase 005 has the smallest blast radius of the causal-graph phases: additive-only, idempotent, never overwrites manual edges; ships immediately after 003+004 merge-sprint
Phase 006 (statediff reconciliation) has highest architectural risk; must ship after 005 stable; REQ-004 stale-delete guard must be preserved in new action-plan model
Phase 007 has no blockers from 003-006; can develop in parallel with 006; ships when shadow-eval passes; default-off ENV flag contains false-positive risk

Phase 008 family child order: 001-aggregator then 003-causal-reducer + 004-retention-reducer in parallel then 002-coco-rerank-consumer then 005-env-tests; coco-rerank last due to Python cross-boundary risk
No phase requires DEFER or SPLIT; 003+004 merge-sprint is the only structural change recommended; total LOC range 1600-2560 across all 10 ranked deliverables
